channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Recovered Nazi-looted portrait discovered in Dutch SS leader's family home
item.description: A previously looted portrait from the Nazi era has been discovered in the home of a Dutch SS leader's family. The painting, which had been missing for decades, was identified by an art investigator sp...

item.title: Former Winnipeg Hockey Coach Receives Six-Year Sentence for Sexual Assault of Player
item.description: A former Winnipeg hockey coach has been sentenced to six years in prison after being found guilty of sexually assaulting a player under his supervision. The case highlighted a troubling pattern of sec...

item.title: Senator Ronald 'Bato' Dela Rosa Returns to Senate Amid ICC Warrant
item.description: Six months after he vanished from public view, Senator Ronald 'Bato' Marapon Dela Rosa returned to the Senate to cast his vote for Alan Peter Cayetano as the new Senate president. The 64-year-old sena...

item.title: KSI Reflects on Past Misogynistic Videos and Emphasises Learning from Mistakes
item.description: KSI, the 32-year-old British influencer, boxer, and Britain's Got Talent judge, has addressed the controversy surrounding old social media posts in which he made misogynistic jokes, some referring to ...

item.title: Palace Confirms No Destabilization Plans Against Marcos Government
item.description: Malacañang has clarified that it has not received any credible information regarding destabilization efforts targeting President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. In a press briefing, Palace Press Offic...

item.title: C. Ve. Shanmugam comments on potential impact of AIADMK-DMK alliance
item.description: In recent remarks in the Tamil Nadu Assembly, C. Ve. Shanmugam, a senior political leader, stated that the AIADMK party would have faced significant challenges and possibly been finished if it had for...

item.title: Senate Seeks to Protect County Budgets Despite National Revenue Shortfalls
item.description: The Kenyan Senate, through its Standing Committee on Finance and Budget, has put forward proposals to the Division of Revenue Bill 2026 aimed at shielding county governments from any shortfalls in nat...

item.title: Federal High Court directs NUPRC to implement Host Communities Trust under PIA
item.description: A Federal High Court sitting for Warri, Delta State, don give judgment wey require the Nigerian Upstream Petroleum Regulatory Commission (NUPRC) to follow the Host Communities Development Trust provis...

item.title: Retail Pharmacy Chains Expanding Affordable Primary Healthcare in SA
item.description: In South Africa, beyond the usual debates about National Health Insurance and public hospital funding, private retail chains like Dis-Chem and Clicks are quietly transforming primary healthcare access...

item.title: Hidden Fat in Muscles Linked to Higher Cardiometabolic Risks
item.description: A recent study has found that fat stored within muscles, known as intermuscular adipose tissue or hidden fat, may increase the risk of cardiovascular and metabolic issues even in individuals who appea...

item.title: Regular engagement with arts and culture linked to slower biological ageing, study suggests
item.description: New research led by academics at University College London (UCL) indicates that regular engagement with arts and cultural activities may play a meaningful role in slowing the biological ageing process...

item.title: Tanzania Revenue Authority pushes for tech solutions to curb tax evasion
item.description: The Tanzania Revenue Authority (TRA) is actively promoting the use of modern technology in customs operations to strengthen tax compliance and fight tax evasion. TRA officials highlighted that integra...

item.title: Practical Ways Local Councils Can Contribute to Climate Action
item.description: While UK local authorities have limited statutory responsibilities regarding climate change, they possess various powers that allow them to influence local environmental outcomes. Councils can utilise...

item.title: Battle of Kidal reveals challenges facing Mali’s military leadership and allies
item.description: This article explains how the battle for Kidal in northern Mali has become a very important moment in understanding the country’s political and security situation. Kidal is not just a military target ...

item.title: Labor Plans Gambling Reform; ANU Featured in Budget Commentary, Julie Bishop Makes Headlines
item.description: The latest edition of 'Tips and Murmurs' covers several noteworthy developments in Australian politics and public life. The Labor government has quietly introduced its response to the 'You win some, y...

item.title: Calgary police investigate targeted shooting that kills one and injures another
item.description: Calgary police are investigating a targeted shooting that occurred on Monday evening in the northwest area of the city. Officers responded to reports of gunfire around 7:50 p.m. at the North Hill Co-o...

item.title: FIR Registered Against SP MP Ajendra Singh Lodhi for Controversial Comments on PM Modi
item.description: A First Information Report (FIR) has been registered against Samajwadi Party MP Ajendra Singh Lodhi at Kotwali Nagar police station in Mahoba district, Uttar Pradesh, following his derogatory remarks ...

item.title: The Creation and Legacy of Van Halen’s 1984 Album Cover
item.description: The cover of Van Halen’s 1984 album, featuring a cherub-like putto smoking a cigarette, is one of the most recognizable images in rock history. Created by graphic artist Margo Nahas in 1982, the artwo...

item.title: Hlengiwe Lushaba-Madlala Explores the Complexity of MaMbokazi in New Mzansi Magic Drama 'Kwa Baba'
item.description: Hlengiwe Lushaba-Madlala stars as MaMbokazi in the upcoming Mzansi Magic daily drama 'Kwa Baba', set to premiere in June. MaMbokazi is portrayed as a woman of deep faith who carries a complicated past...

item.title: Don Jazzy Clarifies That Mavin Records Does Not Sideline Its Artists
item.description: During a YouTube session with Crea8torium, Don Jazzy sharply addressed the ongoing talk say Mavin Records dey favour some artistes over others. He make am clear say di label no dey intentionally sidel...
